candidates.why: Section header for current assets, but not the reported total.
Component of current assets, not total current assets.
Likely a header/partial line, not total current assets.
Exact reported total for current assets on the balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current assets line.

candidates.why: Includes short-term investments, broader than cash equivalents.
Exact cash and cash equivalents line on the balance sheet.
Also an exact cash and cash equivalents line; likely alternate label across periods.
Includes short-term investments, broader than CHE.
Cash flow item, not balance sheet cash balance.
Cash flow financing item, not cash balance.

candidates.row_label: Cash Dividends Paid & Common Stock Buyback - Net
candidates.why: Cash flow financing item, not cash balance.

variables.notes: Preferred pure cash-equivalents labels over cash-plus-investments. Included both exact variants as a priority list for label changes across years.

candidates.why: Section header for current liabilities, not the reported total.
Component of current liabilities, not the total.
Component/header, not total current liabilities.
Exact reported total for current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Wrong maturity bucket and only a component.
Wrong maturity bucket and not total current liabilities.
Wrong maturity bucket.

variables.notes: Selected the exact total current liabilities line.

candidates.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt
candidates.why: Best clean total for current debt; captures short-term debt and current maturities in one line.
Only a component of current debt in years shown; insufficient alone when current maturities are separate.
Captures current maturities of long-term debt excluding lease maturities; may be useful only if no clean total exists.

final_choice.row_label: Short-Term Debt & Current Portion of Long-Term Debt

variables.notes: Used the clean combined current debt total. Avoided adding component rows to prevent double counting. Although this line may include capitalized leases in some periods, it is the best available shortlisted total.

candidates.why: Cash flow movement, not taxes payable balance; also blank in preview.
Exact current taxes payable liability on balance sheet.
Combined total taxes payable across maturities; less precise than short-term payable.

variables.notes: Chose a confident balance-sheet label outside the shortlist because TXP should be a payable balance, not a cash-flow change line. Preferred short-term taxes payable; included combined label as fallback if presentation changes.

candidates.why: Best exact total net PPE line.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total
candidates.why: Also a total net PPE variant; same values here and acceptable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Under Capital Lease - Net
candidates.why: Only leased subset of PPE, not total.
Only component, not total PPE.
Gross PPE total; acceptable only if net total absent, but net is preferred.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Gross
candidates.why: Gross excluding leased-out assets; less preferred than net total.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Under Capital Lease - Gross
candidates.why: Subset only.
Component only.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment - Total
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE carrying amount.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment - Total
candidates.why: Contra-asset, not PPE carrying amount.

candidates.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - Other - Accumulated Depreciation & Impairment
candidates.why: Contra-asset component only.

final_choice.row_label: Property, Plant & Equipment - excluding Assets Leased Out - Net - Total

variables.notes: Preferred total net PPE. Included the alternate total net variant as fallback for possible label variation.
